rationale: Gov't Code §2001.142 governs notification procedures for contested case decisions and orders. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A state agency shall notify each party to a contested case of any decision or order of the agency using at least one of the following methods of service
_note: Rule concerns administrative contested-case notification; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
